  path={"/api/pipeline/planningUnit/{pipelineId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}

  as={"h2"}

  children={"Request"}

InMonths":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"shelfLife":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},"title":"QatTempProgramPlanningUnit"}}},"description":"The
